subcodes.first_line: O Greatest Victory! Be thou with thine essence, thy reality and thy very being, an ear, that thou mayest hearken unto that which thy Lord, the Most Exalted, doth speak [3.5s]... ...The Mount dwellers have assuredly swooned away on the Elevated Mount.  The denizens of the heavenly Kingdom
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا فتح الاعظم کن بکینونتک و حقیقتک و ذاتک سمعا لتسمع ما ینطق ربک العلی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action
